title: GPO Abuse via SharpGPOAbuse
description: Detects SharpGPOAbuse, which weaponizes write access to a Group Policy Object to add an immediate scheduled task, a local admin, or a logon/startup script that executes on all linked computers. GOAD includes GPO write ACL paths.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*SharpGPOAbuse*' or 'Command Line' like '*--AddComputerTask*' or 'Command Line' like '*--AddUserTask*' or 'Command Line' like '*--AddLocalAdmin*' or 'Command Line' like '*--GPOName*')))
